cases.prompt: Deploy the Phishing Triage agent in Security Copilot.

expect.label: Humans in the loop for consequential actions; start in recommendation mode
Govern agent identities like privileged identities - least privilege, monitoring, lifecycle
Review agent activity logs / measure agreement rate
SCU capacity required; confirm licensing for owning product

cases.prompt: How do I supervise an autonomous alert triage agent and set permissions?

expect.label: Start in Recommendation mode for 2-4 weeks, measure agreement rate
Only graduate to autonomous when agreement >90%
Set supervision mode per action, not per agent (blocking/deleting needs approval)

cases.prompt: What permissions does an agent identity need?

expect.label: Each agent has its own Entra Agent ID; do not consolidate identities
Scope to least privilege; remove permissions not needed
Anti-pattern: do not use Global Admin for agent identity
